title: Sci-Fi Spaceship Flythrough
summary: Camera flies through the interior of a futuristic spaceship corridor, lights pulsing.
prompt: A first-person camera flythrough of a futuristic spaceship corridor: gleaming chrome panels lined with pulsing cyan and orange light strips, holographic readouts flickering on the walls, retractable doors hissing open as the camera approaches. Subtle hum of the ship, faint engine vibration. The corridor curves gently, opening into a vast observation window facing a swirling nebula.
